channel.title: AP Cybersecurity Alignment Analysis :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: Working draft for faculty review. Maps the College Board AP Cybersecurity curriculum (Course and Exam Description, 2026–27) against the two-year core to answer two questions: (1) where does a student who earned AP Cybersecurity credit already have foundation, and (2) where does the core not deliver what the AP course develops? The binding use case is the Cybersecurity specialization: this analysis identifies the pre-college foundation the specialization can build on and the gaps it must address.
